name: Peach-Raspberry Ice Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter 3 medium peaches or nectarines.
2. Puree the peaches, raspberries, and lemon juice in an electric blender until smooth. Set aside.
3. Dissolve the gelatin in 1 cup of milk at room temperature in a medium saucepan over low heat. Stir until completely dissolved.
4. Add the remaining milk, sugar, almond extract, and cinnamon to the gelatin mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Pour the fruit puree and milk mixture into an ice cream maker. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
Makes 8 cups, with approximately 55 calories per half-cup serving when using sugar; 40 calories each when using a low-calorie sweetener.
